{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The revised text maps against the nearest 3-5 works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The revised text audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output still presents all recommendations as equally confident, but flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly covers the agreed scope with one minor drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The revised text maps against the nearest 3-5 works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The revised text audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output still presents all recommendations as equally confident, but flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the agreed scope with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
